rulings.Case Title: BRENDA KNIGHT VS. DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Suspension Of Petitioner'S California Driver'S License;Certified Record
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, NOVEMBER 9, 2007, LINE 10, PETITIONER BRENDA KNIGHT'S Amended Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Suspension Of Petitioner's California Driver's License IS DENIED. THE COURT HAS CONDUCTED AN INDEPENDENT REVIEW OF THE EVIDENCE. THE OFFICER'S STATEMENT ON PAGE 3 OF DS 367 EXPLAINS WHAT HAPPENED AND MAKES CLEAR THAT THE TIME OF 00:46 A.M. WAS WHEN PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE WAS FIRST OBSERVED. THE BOXES CHECKED ON THE FORM REFLECT WHAT HAPPENED THEREAFTER. MOREOVER, THERE IS NOTHING IMPOSSIBLE ABOUT 2 OFFICERS EFFECTING SERVICE. =(302/PJM/AY)
